creator: george@m5p.com
text:
Created attachment 256643
Failong builds of devel/py-lxml and devel/py-pyyaml

I finally finished my ports rebuild.  I'm using python 3.11.  There appear to be five ports I use that depend on cython:

1. devel/py-cffi
2. devel/py-lxml
3. devel/py-pyyaml
4. dns/py-dnspython
5. textproc/py-pystemmer

With py311-cython-0.29.37_1 installed, all five build and install.  This is mysteriously inconsistent with my experience at comment #7.

With py311-cython3-3.0.11 installed, devel/py-lxml and devel/py-pyyaml fail to compile.
